690:   const loadPoojaProducts = async () => {
691:     setIsLoadingPooja(true);
692:     try {
693:       const { data, error } = await supabase
694:         .from('website_pooja_products')
695:         .select('*')
696:         .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
697:       if (error) throw error;
698:       if (data) {
699:         const mappedData: PoojaProduct[] = data.map((item: any) => ({
700:           id: item.id,
